---

## Describe the Bug

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Environment

- **n8n version**: (e.g., 1.72.1)
- **Hosting**: (Cloud / Self-hosted Docker / Self-hosted npm)
- **OS** (if self-hosted): (e.g., Ubuntu 22.04)
- **Browser** (if UI-related): (e.g., Chrome 130)

## Affected Workflow

Which workflow is affected?

- [ ] Coordinator Agent
- [ ] Doctor Booking Agent
- [ ] Diagnostics Agent
- [ ] Hospital Comparison Agent

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Open the chat widget / trigger the workflow
2. Send the message: "..."
3. Observe the error in node "..."

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages or execution log excerpts
(redact any credentials or personal data).

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.

## Additional Context

Any other context about the problem.
